# MVP Microservices Scaffolding Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** Scaffold 5 MVP microservices using Seed4J CLI, each as a separate Spring Boot application with hexagonal architecture

**Architecture:** Monorepo with 5 subprojects (rules-service, ledger-service, onboarding-service, switch-adapter-service, biller-service). Each service is generated by Seed4J CLI with full hexagonal architecture. Current `src/` serves as API Gateway + shared utilities.

**Tech Stack:** Java 25, Spring Boot 4, Gradle (Kotlin DSL), Seed4J CLI, PostgreSQL, Flyway, Kafka, ArchUnit

---

## Key Principle

**Seed4J CLI generates each service - NOT manual file creation.**

Each service runs through the full Seed4J scaffolding workflow:
```bash
cd <service-directory>
seed4j apply init ...
seed4j apply gradle-java ...
seed4j apply spring-boot ...
# ... more modules
```

---

## Monorepo Structure

```
agentbanking-seed4j/
├── build.gradle.kts                      # Root build config (current)
├── settings.gradle.kts                   # Links all subprojects
├── docker-compose.yml                    # Infrastructure services
├── src/                                  # API Gateway + shared utilities (current)
├── rules-service/                        # Seed4J generated
├── ledger-service/                       # Seed4J generated
├── onboarding-service/                   # Seed4J generated
├── switch-adapter-service/               # Seed4J generated
└── biller-service/                       # Seed4J generated
```

---

## Port Allocation

| Service | Port | Directory |
|---------|------|-----------|
| API Gateway | 8080 | `src/` (current) |
| Rules Service | 8081 | `rules-service/` |
| Ledger Service | 8082 | `ledger-service/` |
| Onboarding Service | 8083 | `onboarding-service/` |
| Switch Adapter | 8084 | `switch-adapter-service/` |
| Biller Service | 8085 | `biller-service/` |

---

## Seed4J CLI Path

```bash
SEED4J_JAR="/tmp/seed4j-cli/target/seed4j-cli-0.0.1-SNAPSHOT.jar"
export JAVA_HOME="/tmp/jdk-25.0.2+10"
export PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"

seed4j() {
  java -jar "$SEED4J_JAR" "$@"
}
```

---

## Common Seed4J Modules per Service

Each service applies these modules:

```bash
seed4j apply init --project-name "Agent Banking <Service>" --base-name <BaseName> --node-package-manager npm --no-commit
seed4j apply gradle-java --package-name com.agentbanking.<service-package> --no-commit
seed4j apply gradle-wrapper --no-commit
seed4j apply java-base --no-commit
seed4j apply prettier --no-commit
seed4j apply java-memoizers --no-commit
seed4j apply java-enums --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-tomcat --server-port <port> --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-actuator --no-commit
seed4j apply application-service-hexagonal-architecture-documentation --no-commit
seed4j apply java-archunit --no-commit
seed4j apply datasource-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply jpa-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-kafka --no-commit
seed4j apply springdoc-mvc-openapi --no-commit
seed4j apply logs-spy --no-commit
```

---

## Task 1: Scaffold Rules Service

**BDD Scenarios:** Implements BDD Scenario 5: Add Spring Boot with Hexagonal Architecture

**BRD Requirements:** Fulfills US-S02: Generate MVP services with hexagonal architecture, US-R01 to US-R04

**Files:**
- Create: `rules-service/` directory
- Seed4J generates: complete hexagonal structure

- [ ] **Step 1: Create directory and initialize**

```bash
mkdir -p rules-service
cd rules-service
seed4j apply init --project-name "Agent Banking Rules" --base-name AgentBankingRules --node-package-manager npm --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Apply Gradle setup**

```bash
seed4j apply gradle-java --package-name com.agentbanking.rules --no-commit
seed4j apply gradle-wrapper --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Apply Java base and quality**

```bash
seed4j apply java-base --no-commit
seed4j apply prettier --no-commit
seed4j apply java-memoizers --no-commit
seed4j apply java-enums --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Apply Spring Boot with hexagonal architecture**

```bash
seed4j apply spring-boot --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-tomcat --server-port 8081 --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-actuator --no-commit
seed4j apply application-service-hexagonal-architecture-documentation --no-commit
seed4j apply java-archunit --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 5: Apply database support**

```bash
seed4j apply datasource-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply jpa-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway-postgresql --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 6: Apply messaging and docs**

```bash
seed4j apply spring-boot-kafka --no-commit
seed4j apply springdoc-mvc-openapi --no-commit
seed4j apply logs-spy --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 7: Verify build**

```bash
cd rules-service
./gradlew build -x test
```

- [ ] **Step 8: Commit**

```bash
cd ..
git add rules-service/
git commit -m "feat(rules): scaffold Rules Service with Seed4J CLI"
```

---

## Task 2: Scaffold Ledger Service

**BRD Requirements:** US-L01, US-L02, US-L03 (Ledger & Float)

- [ ] **Step 1: Create directory and initialize**

```bash

cd ledger-service
seed4j apply init --project-name "Agent Banking Ledger" --base-name AgentBankingLedger --node-package-manager npm --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Apply all modules (same as Rules Service)**

```bash
seed4j apply gradle-java --package-name com.agentbanking.ledger --no-commit
seed4j apply gradle-wrapper --no-commit

seed4j apply prettier --no-commit

seed4j apply application-service-hexagonal-architecture-documentation --no-commit

seed4j apply datasource-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply jpa-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway --no-commit
seed4j apply flyway-postgresql --no-commit
seed4j apply spring-boot-kafka --no-commit
seed4j apply springdoc-mvc-openapi --no-commit
seed4j apply logs-spy --no-commit
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify build**

```bash

./gradlew build -x test
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
cd ..
git add ledger-service/
git commit -m "feat(ledger): scaffold Ledger & Float Service with Seed4J CLI"
```

## Task 6: Update Root Gradle Configuration

- [ ] **Step 1: Update settings.gradle.kts**

```kotlin
rootProject.name = 'agentbanking'

include('rules-service')
include('ledger-service')
include('onboarding-service')
include('switch-adapter-service')
include('biller-service')
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Verify all services build**

```bash
./gradlew build -x test
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add settings.gradle.kts
git commit -m "build: include all 5 MVP services in Gradle multi-project build"
```

---

## Task 7: Final Verification

- [ ] **Step 1: Run all tests**

```bash
./gradlew test
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run ArchUnit tests**

```bash
./gradlew test --tests "*ArchTest*"
```

- [ ] **Step 3: Verify complete build**

```bash
./gradlew build
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Commit**

```bash
git add -A
git commit -m "feat: complete MVP microservices scaffolding with Seed4J CLI"
```

---

| Task | Service | Port | Package | User Stories |

| 1 | Rules Service | 8081 | com.agentbanking.rules | US-R01 to US-R04 |
| 2 | Ledger Service | 8082 | com.agentbanking.ledger | US-L01 to US-L03 |
| 3 | Onboarding Service | 8083 | com.agentbanking.onboarding | US-O01 to US-O03 |
| 4 | Switch Adapter | 8084 | com.agentbanking.switch | US-V01 |
| 5 | Biller Service | 8085 | com.agentbanking.biller | US-BO01 |
| 6 | Gradle Config | N/A | N/A | N/A |
| 7 | Verification | N/A | N/A | N/A |

**Each service is generated by Seed4J CLI with full hexagonal architecture.**
